# Preqal

> Preqal is a quality, safety and compliance consultancy in Georgetown, Guyana. It takes Guyanese and Caribbean businesses from first business plan to export-certified supplier through five fixed-scope services. Founded and led by Dr. Stefan Gravesande, MBBS. Known as the Clinic on Quality.

Preqal serves poultry and hatchery operations, agro-processors, eco-tourism, logistics, oil and gas services and HR firms across Guyana and the Caribbean. Clients hold a 98% audit pass rate, with an average of nine months from first scan to certification readiness.

## Services

- [Preqal Business Plan](https://preqal.org/services/business-plan): bank-ready business plans for Guyanese entrepreneurs with compliance built in.
- [Preqal Risk Scan](https://preqal.org/services/risk-scan): a 7-day quality, safety and compliance diagnostic with a Red Flag Report and action roadmap.
- [Preqal Systems Builder](https://preqal.org/services/systems-builder): ISO 9001, ISO 14001 and ISO 45001 management systems built with the client's team in 9 months, ending in a mock certification audit.
- [Preqal Certified Care](https://preqal.org/services/certified-care): monthly retainer that keeps certifications valid, including annual internal audits and surveillance-visit support.
- [Preqal Export-Ready](https://preqal.org/services/export-ready): takes small agro-processors from unregulated to export certified through three gates, HACCP, ISO 22000 and GFSI scheme readiness (FSSC 22000, BRCGS or SQF).

## Learning

- [Free e-course](https://preqal.org/e-courses): Build Systems That Actually Work, nine modules on practical quality management with a verifiable certificate.
- [Free templates](https://preqal.org/resources): QHSE policy, document control procedure and IMS registers, direct download.

## Contact

- Location: Georgetown, Guyana, serving the Caribbean region
